caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Turks and Caicos Today
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 18 knots with wave heights reaching 5.8 feet and an 8-second swell period from the east-northeast. There is a high 85 percent chance of rainfall, creating wet conditions that will affect marine and port operations throughout the day.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing persistent heavy rain with a 100% probability throughout the day, accompanied by moderate southeast winds peaking at 17 knots and wave heights reaching 2.1 feet with a 7-second swell period. Nearby Venice reports slightly stronger winds up to 20 knots but less rainfall, maintaining generally safe marine conditions across the central Mediterranean.
